name: Back for You
overview: In the early Republic of China, police officer A Lai is saved by a mysterious woman, Lu Na, who falls into a coma. Using her comic books, he solves cases and uncovers clues about her past, all while facing rising dangers linked to his newfound success.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Back For You | Angelababy x Wang Anyu | 漫影寻踪 | iQIYI
